title: Custom Directives & Scalars
description: Design custom GraphQL directives to implement schema-level cross-cutting concerns (e.g., authentication, caching). Implement custom scalar types for strict validation of specific data formats (e.g., Email, DateTime).
objectives: Design custom GraphQL directives to implement schema-level cross-cutting concerns (e.g., authentication, caching).
Implement custom scalar types for strict validation of specific data formats (e.g., Email, DateTime).
